Jahre Erfahrung im Weinhandel: years of experience in the wine trade

Seiten-Layouts für die Feinspitz-Inhalts: Page layouts for the Feinspitz content pages.
Häufige Fragen zu histamingeprüften Wein: Frequently asked questions about histamine-tested wines, shipping within Switzerland, pickup in Urdorf as well as vegan and alcohol-free wines - clearly answered by Feinspitz.
Was bedeutet „histamingeprüft\" bei eine: What does “histamine-tested” mean for a wine?
Histamingeprüfte Weine werden im Labor a: Histamine-tested wines are analysed in the laboratory for their histamine content. That way you know where you stand before buying - ideal for anyone who values tolerability and wants to enjoy wine consciously.
Nein. Wein enthält von Natur aus geringe: No. Wine naturally contains small amounts of histamine - there is no such thing as histamine-free. “Tested” means the content is known and shown to be low. If you have a diagnosed histamine intolerance, please consult your doctor when in doubt.
Wie erkenne ich vegane und alkoholfreie: How do I recognise vegan and alcohol-free wines in the shop?
Passende Weine sind mit den Merkmalen „v: Suitable wines are marked with the “vegan” or “alcohol-free” attributes and can be shown specifically via the filters in the shop. Vegan wines are made without animal-based fining agents; alcohol-free wines are a gentle alternative for carefree enjoyment.
Wohin liefert Feinspitz und was kostet d: Where does Feinspitz deliver and what does shipping cost?
Wir versenden schweizweit mit Schweizer: We ship throughout Switzerland with Swiss shipping partners. Delivery is carefully packaged in break-proof wine boxes. You will see the current shipping costs and any free-shipping thresholds transparently in the cart before you order.
Wie lange dauert die Lieferung innerhalb: How long does delivery within Switzerland take?
Bestellungen bearbeiten wir in der Regel: We usually process orders within one to two working days. After that your wine is normally with you within a few working days - depending on the shipping method and region.
Kann ich meine Bestellung in Urdorf abho: Can I pick up my order in Urdorf?
Ja. Sie können Ihre Bestellung nach Absp: Yes. You can pick up your order from us in Urdorf by arrangement and save the shipping costs. Please wait for our pickup confirmation before you come by, so that everything is ready.
Ab welchem Alter kann ich Wein bestellen: What age do I have to be to order wine?
Alkoholische Weine geben wir ausschliess: We only supply alcoholic wines to persons aged 18 and over. By placing your order you confirm that you are of legal age.
Berät mich Feinspitz auch persönlich bei: Does Feinspitz also advise me personally on the selection?
Sehr gerne. Wir verkosten unser Sortimen: Gladly. We taste our range ourselves and advise you honestly - whether on tolerability, food pairings or the right wine for an occasion. Simply get in touch with us via the contact page.
Geführte Weinprobe an einem Messestand: Guided wine tasting at a trade-fair stand

Winzer im Weinberg des Familienweinguts: Winemaker in the vineyard of the Steyrer family estate in the Traisental, bearing organic, histamine and vegan seals
Vom Traisental in Ihr Glas: From the Traisental into your glass
Unsere Weine stammen vom Familienweingut: Our wines come from the Steyrer family estate in the Traisental in Lower Austria. On sun-drenched terraces, what is close to our hearts grows there: honest wine, grown in harmony with nature and with deep respect for it.
Familie Steyrer bewirtschaftet ihre Rebe: The Steyrer family cultivates its vines sustainably - certified by Austria Bio Garantie, 100% histamine-tested and vegan. As Switzerland's first supplier of histamine-tested wines, we have been bringing this craft to you for over 20 years.
„Wir machen Wein so, wie wir ihn selbst: “We make wine the way we want to drink it ourselves: pure, well-tolerated and with a joy in enjoyment.”
- Familie Steyrer & das Feinspitz-Team: - The Steyrer family & the Feinspitz team

Direkter Kontakt zu Winzern und Produzen: Direct contact with winemakers and producers. We only add what we have tasted ourselves and found to be good.
Ehrliche Beratung ohne Schnickschnack -: Honest advice without frills - in the shop in Urdorf and with every recommendation we make.
Feinspitz steht für sorgfältig ausgewähl: Feinspitz stands for carefully selected wines and specialities - with one conviction at its core: enjoyment should be wholesome. As Switzerland's first supplier of histamine-tested wines, we have helped shape an entire category.
Was vor zwei Jahrzehnten mit der Suche n: What began two decades ago with the search for well-tolerated wines is today a curated range of wine and gourmet specialities. We work directly with winemakers, taste for ourselves and only add what convinces us.
Persönliche Beratung, ehrliche Qualität: Personal advice, honest quality and a focus on digestibility - that is the heart of Feinspitz.
